title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search video reviews numerous recent AI tools and models released in 2025, including 3D generators like Pixal3D and Sana-WM, open-source models like MiniCPM, generative video tools like Krea2, and updates to ChatGPT and other services. The content covers approximately 30 distinct AI products and features across video, 3D, audio, and language domains.
